---
title: "\'The Quandary of Influence: The Case of Mary Ward and Charlotte Yonge\'"
---

## \'The Quandary of Influence: The Case of Mary Ward and Charlotte Yonge\'

**Author:** Laura Fasick
**Date:** 1994
**Imprint:** <i>English Literature in Transition</i> 37 (1994) 141-154

---

[← Back to all letters](../../letters.html)
